channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.9
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.9

  • Model download progress bar — Settings now shows real progress instead of a spinner
  • Auto-select model — Newly downloaded model auto-sets as default if previous default was deleted
  • Model picker clarity — Shows "(not downloaded)" next to unavailable models
  • Crash fix — Safe fallback when no models are downloaded
